raw_text: very disappointing experience with blinkit my order was cancelled from there side yet my refund is being delayed again n again. I had placed an order on 20th of may , firstly I was told that the refund would be processed by 25th may and now the day has been shifted to 28th may. payments are deducted instantly, but refund take several days even when the mistake is from company's side. poor customer support and an unfair refund process. pls resolve this issue Emidiatly

Blinkit has become my go-to app for groceries. The delivery is incredibly fast, and the groceries always arrive fresh. Even ice cream reaches me perfectly frozen, which is impressive. One of the best things Blinkit has done is offering a free ambulance service. It's a thoughtful initiative that can genuinely help people during emergencies. I also appreciate that Blinkit's delivery partners continue working even during the rain to ensure customers receive their orders. Compared to other

Very disappointing service from Blinkit. The quality of products is getting worse day by day. Many items arrive damaged or not fresh, and when we ask for a replacement, they don’t replace the product properly — instead they just add money to the Blinkit wallet/app balance. There is no proper replacement option offered for customers. This feels unfair and inconvenient. Expected much better service and customer support.

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I received a **Plum Green Tea Pore Cleansing Face Wash** with an expiry date of **02/2026**, even though it is already **July 2026**. The product was expired, and the packaging was dirty. I requested a replacement, but the replacement was also expired with the same expiry date and in poor condition. This shows poor quality control and inventory management. Such negligence is unacceptable, especially for skincare products.

I am updating my review. Because just now , I have purchased a hair straightener and that product was very small. so immediately after delivery within a second I tried to return. But they refused to return. I request you to not buy electric things from this platform.

It's now the worst app.Especially if you want to deliver to another location or send someone anything.Incompetent delivery partners who ask you to get your order from the street! And not a single delivery person reads the address, they only follow the map, which never shows real location. It's now the most frustrating app.

Blinkit deducted money from my account still no ordered placed. My money is still not returned (even after 7 days), and that was a BIG AMOUNT. They have no customer care helpline no. as well. I'm stopping use this app as they have no responsibility and accountability for their customers and I will be suggesting this to others as well. DISAPPOINTING.

“Blinkit is one of the fastest and most convenient delivery apps I’ve ever used. The delivery is super quick, products are fresh, and the app is very easy to use. Whether it’s groceries, snacks, drinks, or daily essentials, everything arrives in minutes. The customer support is also helpful and responsive. Perfect for busy days and last-minute needs. Highly recommended for anyone who wants fast and reliable shopping at home!”

it's good and delivers really quick but the delivery charges are way to high you can't buy any thing in emergency if you don't have enough money like a note of 200 and there is a limitto do cash on delivery i mean that you have to order something of atleast 100₹ .so it's good but I just want the charges to low down and that limit to go away .

first of all. ordr delivered in 29 mins, not 10 mins. second - if an item in the order is not available, customer needs to be informed before pmt. so that we can atleast order a substitute. even the delivery person did not inform. realised only after opening the packet. kindly keep updating/ stock availability on your app. the missing item was a very commonly used food item, required for immdt use. disappointing to see this messed up.

You delivered rotten sweet potatoes. It was obvious that they were spoiled, yet they were packed and sent to me. The moment I opened the package, a rotten, mushy piece fell out with a horrible smell. Do you not check the quality of the products before packing and dispatching them? This is completely unacceptable.

It shows as available in stock—which implies the product exists—and the delivery person even set out with it. I placed the order and waited a long time for the delivery person, only for the status to update saying he had arrived, and now I am being told the product is out of stock. What exactly do you take the customer for? and delivery men tell me sir you can cancel your order And Blinkit shows that your order has been delivered

I don't like this app because you guys added extra around 50 rupees Even when I ordered more than 400 rupees items and also don't mention about this fees and after ordering it when I saw these extra charges I tried to cancel the order but they don't cancelled it and also this was not delivery charge

This app is a total fraud. It doesn't deliver the items we order and feels like it's only taking people's money. Even when we try to report issues through the help section, there is no proper support it's only showing the reorder option. In my experience, Instamart and other online shopping apps are much better. handling charges and small cart charges are very high and inconvenient. There are a lot of regular and daily products missing on this site. The delivery queue and delivery time is too much for 1.5km. poor experience

Expensive and I recommend to use it only for urgent delivery. I compared the prices with bb and blinkit is charging 15-20 ₹more on every item. They are taking advantage of consumers. Not a good business to live for long term.

Such a worst app. I have ordered some fruits and they were delivered rotten. after one of persistent efforts, they refunded in the form of Promo code as it is their marketing strategy as the customer should purchase only from their app. I want the refund to bank account.

Here is a single statement that captures all of your points: "It is a frequent issue on Blinkit that customers provide incorrect locations, often leading to a detour of 5-6 km, which is a significant challenge for a bicycle delivery partner. I did not receive any support from the store manager during cancellation, and Blinkit support executives abruptly disconnected my call without listening to the full situation, which led to an unfair deduction of my incentive. Furthermore, the platform does

They advertise it as the very best but deliver a very poor road side product instead. Do not order from this site. The customer care team is also arrogant and unhelpful. I do not recommend buying anything from this website. Even if the prices seem cheap, you may end up wasting your money on poor-quality products that are not as advertised. Please be careful before placing an order."

I am extremely disappointed with this purchase and Blinkit's customer support. The cable wire delivered appears to be of poor quality and is not properly connecting with the adapter as advertised. The product was clearly covered under a 7-day replacement policy, yet my replacement request was denied without a satisfactory explanation. Despite reporting the issue promptly, neither a replacement nor a return was offered.I request an immediate resolution
